name: full-parity-check
expected_behavior: Runs pnpm check:parity (or the four sub-checks individually)
Parses OK/WARN/FAIL lines from all script outputs
Generates a dated Parity Report with Summary and Per-Module Details sections
Counts passing, warning, and failing modules
Lists specific issues and remediation steps for any non-passing module
Does not modify any files

name: single-module-parity-check
expected_behavior: Normalizes 'MyBudget' to module id 'budget'
Runs pnpm check:standalone and pnpm check:module-parity
Runs pnpm check:passthrough-parity since budget is a passthrough module
Filters output to show only budget/MyBudget-related lines
Performs a deep dive: route comparison, passthrough wrapper verification, schema check
Enumerates standalone routes under MyBudget/apps/web/app/ and hub routes under apps/web/app/budget/
Verifies each hub wrapper contains a thin re-export to @mybudget-web alias
Generates a focused drift report for the budget module only
Does not modify any files

name: natural-language-parity-trigger
prompt: Are the standalone apps in sync with the hub?
expected_behavior: Recognizes this as a parity check request
Runs the full parity suite: pnpm check:parity
Optionally runs pnpm test:parity-matrix for deeper coverage
Generates a complete Parity Report covering all integrated modules
Highlights any standalone repos with HEAD drift warnings
Reports passthrough enforcement status for each web module
Provides a clear yes/no sync summary alongside the detailed report
Does not modify any files
